days.title: Arrival in Hong Kong
days.subtitle: Exploring the vibrant city

timeline.title: Arrive at Hong Kong International Airport
timeline.detail: Your flight lands at Hong Kong. Follow signs to immigration and baggage claim before exiting to the airport shuttle terminal.

timeline.title: Take Airport Express to Hong Kong Station
timeline.detail: Board the Airport Express for a quick ride to Hong Kong Station in Central. The journey takes about 24 minutes and is comfortable with luggage.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel COZi 10
timeline.detail: Drop your bags off at Hotel COZi in Yau Ma Tei. A stylish hotel located just a short walk from the Yau Ma Tei MTR station.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel COZi 10, Yau Ma Tei, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Stroll through the Temple Street Night Market
timeline.detail: Explore the vibrant Temple Street Night Market. Watch street performers, shop for unique souvenirs, and soak in the local atmosphere.
timeline.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market, Yau Ma Tei, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Dinner at Sister Wah
timeline.detail: Enjoy a famous bowl of beef brisket noodle soup at Sister Wah, a local favorite. Their rich broth and tender beef are highly praised.
timeline.mapQuery: Sister Wah, Yau Ma Tei, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Relax at the hotel
timeline.detail: End your first day in Hong Kong by relaxing at the hotel. Enjoy the amenities and plan for tomorrow's explorations.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel COZi 10, Yau Ma Tei, Hong Kong

localTips: Get an Octopus Card at the airport for convenient travel on public transport.
Try to visit the Temple Street Night Market early to avoid crowds.
Be mindful of pocket pickers in busy markets; keep belongings secure.

days.title: Exploring Central and Victoria Peak
days.subtitle: A day of history and views

timeline.title: Breakfast at Australia Dairy Company
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional Hong Kong-style breakfast with toast, eggs, and milk tea at this iconic diner that opens early.
timeline.mapQuery: Australia Dairy Company, Jordan, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Take the Star Ferry to Central
timeline.detail: Board the Star Ferry for a scenic ride across Victoria Harbour. This iconic ferry ride offers stunning views of Hong Kong's skyline.
timeline.mapQuery: Star Ferry Pier, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Visit the Hong Kong Museum of History
timeline.detail: Explore the museum that showcases Hong Kong's rich history, from prehistoric times to the modern era. It offers engaging exhibits for all ages.
timeline.mapQuery: Hong Kong Museum of History, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Lunch at Tim Ho Wan
timeline.detail: Savor world-famous dim sum at Tim Ho Wan, known as the dim sum specialist. Be ready to queue for this unforgettable culinary experience!
timeline.mapQuery: Tim Ho Wan, Mong Kok, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Visit Victoria Peak
timeline.detail: Take the Peak Tram up to Victoria Peak for panoramic views of the city. Enjoy the lush surroundings and lookout points at the top.

timeline.title: Dinner at Jumbo Kingdom
timeline.detail: Dine in style at Jumbo Kingdom, a floating restaurant known for its dim sum and seafood. Enjoy the unique atmosphere and scenic views of the harbor.

localTips: Purchase Peak Tram tickets in advance to skip long lines during peak hours.
Consider taking the tram back down for a different view of the city.
Visit the museum on weekdays to avoid larger crowds.

days.title: Culinary Delights and Departure
days.subtitle: A last taste of Hong Kong

timeline.title: Breakfast at Mak's Noodle
timeline.detail: Start your day with a delicious bowl of wanton noodles at Mak's Noodle, a landmark in Hong Kong's culinary scene famous for its flavorful broth.

timeline.title: Wander through PMQ
timeline.detail: Explore PMQ, a hub of design and creativity in Hong Kong. Browse local designer shops and art galleries for unique souvenirs.

timeline.title: Lunch at Mak's Cheung Fun
timeline.detail: Enjoy cheung fun (rice noodle rolls) and other local dishes at this casual eatery. Their soy sauce dipping is particularly delicious.
timeline.mapQuery: Mak's Cheung Fun, Central, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Return to Hotel and Checkout
timeline.detail: Head back to the hotel to pack and check out. Make sure all belongings are gathered before leaving.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel COZi 10, Yau Ma Tei, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Take Airport Express back to the airport
timeline.detail: Save time and stress by taking the Airport Express back to Hong Kong International Airport. Ensure you arrive at least 2 hours before your flight.
timeline.mapQuery: Hong Kong Airport Express, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Departure from Hong Kong International Airport
timeline.detail: Board your flight back to Penang. Reflect on the memorable experiences from your trip as you head home.

localTips: Try to negotiate prices at local shops, especially in markets.
Allow extra time for security at the airport during peak travel times.
Keep some HKD cash for small purchases.

hotels.name: Hotel COZi 10
hotels.note: Located a short walk from the Yau Ma Tei MTR station.

budget.note: Dining at local restaurants during the trip
